name: Chocolate Chip Turtle Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C). Grease a 9 x 13-inch (23 x 33 cm) pan with shortening. Place a cooling rack on the countertop.
2. In a large bowl, combine shortening, brown sugar, milk, and vanilla. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended. Add egg and beat into the creamed mixture.
3. Sift flour, salt, and baking soda into the creamed mixture. Mix just until blended. Stir in chocolate chips.
4. Divide dough into thirds. Pat 2/3 of the dough into the prepared pan.
5. In a small saucepan, combine caramels and water. Heat over very low heat, stirring constantly until melted. Pour caramel mixture over the dough, leaving at least 1/2 inch (1 cm) from the edge. Divide remaining dough into teaspoonfuls (5 mL) and drop evenly over the caramel layer.
6. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until golden brown. Do not overbake. Remove from pan using a knife, cool completely on a rack, and cut into bars. Makes about 2 dozen bars.
